channel.title: Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily
channel.description: Recent content on Cyril's Cloud & AI Daily

item.title: About
item.description:
Cyril Bou-Harb

Solution Engineer, Cloud & AI — Data & AI at Microsoft

I help organizations unlock the potential of cloud and AI technologies. This blog is my daily space for sharing insights, new releases, and practical commentary on what’s happening in the Microsoft Cloud & AI ecosystem.

Topics I cover:

  • Azure AI & Data services
  • Microsoft Fabric & Analytics
  • AI/ML platforms and tools
  • Architecture patterns & best practices
  • New product releases and updates

The views expressed here are my own and do not represent Microsoft’s official positions.

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description:
This is the very first entry. A blank page is both terrifying and exciting — it can become anything. The plan is simple: show up every day, write something honest, and hit save. No rules on length or topic. Just words.

What you’ll find here:

  • Daily curated content from the Microsoft Cloud & AI ecosystem
  • Personal commentary on new releases, documentation updates, and community discussions
  • Architecture diagrams when I’m breaking down how things work
  • Podcast versions of posts for when you’d rather listen

Here’s to day one. 🚀
